## Compliance checklist

- [ ] Does this change any AI decision path? If yes, confirm the Merkle audit chain still logs the decision.
- [ ] Does this change affect extended-thinking calls? If yes, verify thinking blocks are preserved in multi-turn messages.
- [ ] Does this change any structured output schema? If yes, update the JSON Schema in the relevant module.
- [ ] Does this change affect Annex IV documentation output? If yes, update `docs/ARCHITECTURE_DECISIONS.md` if a new ADR is warranted.
